scope: RISK-01 through RISK-14 adapter readiness only; no training, bank generation, remote mutation, or tmux launch was performed
commands_executed: Test-Path checks for every named RISK adapter candidate
python <existing-script> --help for all existing Python candidates
python launch_*_tmux.py --print-only for legacy launcher candidates
KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK=TRUE python -m unittest tests.test_build_corrupted_beauty_utility_report -v (3 tests OK; default combined run hit Windows OpenMP duplicate-runtime failure)
rg -n for model names, markers, evaluator, selector, bank, and RISK decision symbols

adapters.title: Lock the shared evaluator and validation selector

candidate_scripts.role: legacy DiffuRec-only evaluator; excluded from new confirmation

success_markers: E0 dated package exists and hashes validate
adapters.dataset_coverage: E0 artifact matrix has 18 entries across four domains; no generic baseline adapter
adapters.seed_behavior: E0 evaluation seed 100; historical checkpoints use legacy training selection
adapters.selector_version: selection equivalence not recomputed; validation-only selector contract is not exposed as a training adapter
adapters.config_split_bank_hashes: E0 JSON records split hashes and source hashes; no new queue manifest binding
adapters.blocker: Existing E0 package is audit evidence, not a reusable common adapter with a queue success marker. Every newly trained method still needs one shared evaluator/selector wrapper and protocol audit.

adapters.title: Amend optimizer ownership and rerun the E1 lockstep trace
inputs: Beauty production frames and text assets
adapters.dataset_coverage: Beauty matched production trio only in existing trace
adapters.seed_behavior: source constant seed 100; trace steps 0,1,100,1000; FP32 tolerance 1e-6
adapters.selector_version: step-1000 validation selector evidence in trace implementation
adapters.config_split_bank_hashes: existing hard-stop records bank hash and canonical parameter hash
adapters.blocker: Existing e01_hard_stop.json reports source trace fail at step 0: core_proposal_logits.in_optimizer differs between host and final_v2_closed_gate_full; no amendment trace or PASS marker exists.

adapters.title: Implement train-only positive-exposure risk reports

candidate_scripts.role: u_tilde diagnostic over train/val/test, not train-only EPE/PNE

inputs: existing train split and text embeddings for utility diagnostics
adapters.dataset_coverage: historical reports cover multiple domains; no contract-complete EPE/PNE artifact
adapters.seed_behavior: Gate0 utility default seed 7; not seed100 because it is a diagnostic sampling seed
adapters.evaluator_version: not recorded as RISK-01 common evaluator
adapters.config_split_bank_hashes: some reports hash text assets and train split, but no row-identity contract for EPE/PNE
adapters.blocker: No adapter computes the frozen EPE formula and PNE@10 nearest-neighbor definition from exactly 4000 train transitions with user-clustered uncertainty or an explicit not-estimable field; existing reports do not satisfy this schema.

adapters.title: Build and preflight controlled evidence banks

candidate_scripts.role: reads historical token-dropout banks; does not build popularity-stratified Beauty/Steam banks

outputs: 12 immutable banks, six levels per Beauty/Steam, permutation and preflight reports
adapters.dataset_coverage: no exact two-domain six-level builder present
adapters.config_split_bank_hashes: no bank hashes generated by a current adapter
adapters.blocker: The spec-referenced build_corrupted_text_bank.py is absent. Existing Beauty token-dropout utility code consumes prebuilt historical banks and is not the approved popularity-stratified permutation protocol; no pilot may launch.

adapters.title: Freeze prospective risk protocol and pilot predictions

candidate_scripts.role: older ASO prediction report, not the RISK-05 preregistration

outputs: dated immutable preregistration and freeze marker
adapters.seed_behavior: must bind corruption seed 100 and preregistration seed fields; absent

adapters.title: Run SASRec, Caser, and GRURec on all four domains

adapters.title: Integrate and run DiffRec on all four domains
inputs: DiffuRec upstream checkout and frozen protocol frames

hard_stops: Do not create a real tmux session or queue root from this report.
Do not treat the E0 artifact-only package as a complete common training adapter.
Do not call DiffuRec a DiffRec reproduction or put it in the confirmatory baseline group.
Do not schedule RISK-06/RISK-07 pilots until RISK-04 and RISK-05 adapters exist and E1 has a terminal marker.
Do not schedule any RISK-10/RISK-11/RISK-13/RISK-14 training while adapters or gates are absent.
